/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -march=native -DNDEBUG -DEIGEN_NO_DEBUG CMakeFiles/fthfb.dir/fthfb_numeric.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fthfb.dir/data_output.cpp.o -o fthfb  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/hdf5/serial /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/hdf5/serial/libhdf5.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libdl.a -lm
